description: CompositionFull leather natural brownish-grey and black shoes with multi-directional rubber outsole and cushioned back soleWash care1. Remove dust with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washIf you are born for trekking and hiking, then grab this pair of leather shoes from adidas for that ultimate comfort for your feet while you indulge in adventurous activities. Made of pure leather, they add a wild edge to your outfit, while the comfort sockliner and heavily cushioned backsole ensure ample comfort to the entire foot. The multi directional rubber outsole employ maximum grip and support, making this an ideal footwear for adventure Sports.
